data.biography: Hayato Dojima (堂島 颯人, Dōjima Hayato, June 16, 1995) is a Japanese voice actor from Fukuoka Prefecture. He is affiliated with Across Entertainment.
data.name: Hayato Dojima

data.biography: Hayato Dojima (堂島 颯人, Dōjima Hayato, 16 de junio de 1995) es un actor de voz (seiyuu) japonés de la prefectura de Fukuoka. Está afiliado a Across Entertainment.
data.name: Hayato Dojima

data.biography: 堂島颯人是日本的男性聲優。出身於福岡縣，所屬公司為 ACROSS ENTERTAINMENT。
data.name: 堂島颯人
